assets.label: Bar Board Base
assets.description: Existing peg-board style base plate for spacing, pivot placement, and linkage alignment experiments.

assets.label: Bar Board Guide Overlay
assets.description: Facilitator-facing guide that makes board spacing and allowed pivot positions explicit.

assets.label: Inspectable Linkage Bars
assets.description: Linkage bars with selectable holes for one-change/one-motion repair episodes.

assets.label: Cam and Follower Set
assets.description: Cam profile variants for rise/fall explanation episodes after the linkage P0 pilot.

assets.label: Crank Slider Set
assets.description: Linear motion set for future push/pull character actions.

assets.label: Gears and Pulleys Set
assets.description: Repeatable coordination parts for future comparative mechanism families.

assets.label: Character Connectors
assets.description: Connectors that make the motion-to-character-action link visible and reversible.

assets.label: Trace Prompt Cards
assets.description: Prompt cards for predict-observe-explain and trace-duel conversations.

assets.label: Fabrication Check Cards
assets.description: Cards for identifying jams from looseness, collisions, friction, spacing, and material behavior.
